allow:
Bash(git add flag-shop.html dashboard.html && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add pride flag card, custom flag description field, and dashboard order updates

- Pride flag now renders as a CSS rainbow gradient \(no external SVG dependency\)
- Custom flag card in coverflow shows a text input for the customer to
  describe which country/flag they want; description flows through to
  the order confirmation email and selection strip
- Dashboard: corrected flags for all orders \(Nimatha, Mormor, Aunty G\),
  added Uncle Wadood \(sent\), Uncle Arez \(Kurdistan\), Uncle Ayman \(Palestine\)
- Dashboard: SPECIAL_FLAGS lookup for kurdistan + pride image URLs
- Dashboard: flag images made smaller \(30×45px\), empty-city guard on map

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add flag-shop.html && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Tone down flag notes to match Otis's actual energy

Less perfectionist, more honest — he draws flags because he likes
them, not because he's counting maple leaf points or memorising
rainbow orders. Notes now sound like a real 6.5-year-old.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
